pdg_node.statement: (x: Any, self_attn_mask: Any, self_attn_padding_mask: Any) -> Any

declaration.name: rowselfattention
declaration.type_signature: (x: Any, self_attn_mask: Any, self_attn_padding_mask: Any) -> Any
declaration.conceptual_summary: Masked Intra-Axis Contextual Aggregation. Applies self-referential, content-based interaction along a designated row-like axis of a feature tensor. Pairwise compatibilities are computed between elements on that axis, constrained by a structural mask and a validity mask, then normalized to produce adaptive mixing weights. The output is a contextualized tensor where each element becomes a weighted combination of permitted peers while preserving overall tensor topology.. Applications: Multi-sensor robotics: fuse correlated channel readings across synchronized timesteps while masking failed or unavailable sensors., Genomics/proteomics representation learning: contextualize sequence-position embeddings using experiment-specific validity masks., Power-grid monitoring: model dependency-aware interactions among node-state vectors with topology-derived attention masks., Medical signal analysis: aggregate multilead physiological traces with per-lead dropout/padding masks for robust latent feature construction.
